slides.title: The cancer screening can actually *prevent*.
slides.sub: Colorectal cancer usually starts as a small polyp. Find it early and you can remove it before it ever turns dangerous.

slides.title: It starts as a polyp
slides.body: Most colorectal cancers grow slowly from a *precancerous polyp* over years. That long window is exactly what makes screening so powerful.

slides.title: Catch it before it turns
slides.body: A colonoscopy can find and remove polyps in the same visit. Removing them early *can prevent* the cancer from ever forming.

slides.title: A test you do at home
slides.body: A stool-based FIT test checks for hidden blood and is done at home. A positive result *is followed by* a colonoscopy.

slides.title: Most adults at 45
slides.body: Guidelines now suggest starting at age 45 for average risk. Earlier *if it runs* in your family, so talk with your doctor.

slides.title: Detect and prevent
slides.body: Few cancers can be stopped before they begin. Staying on schedule *is one of* the highest-value choices you can make.

slides.title: Small habits, *fewer surprises*.
slides.body: Vibe Health keeps your sleep, food, movement and steps in one daily score, so the everyday basics stay on track between checkups.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Colorectal cancer is one of the few cancers screening can actually prevent, not just catch. 🌿

Polyps grow slowly, a colonoscopy or at-home FIT test can find them early, and most adults can start at 45. Save this and book the conversation. 🔖

Vibe Health turns your daily habits into one simple score → link in bio.
